question: The bar chart represents the revenue for a company from 2018 to 2022. Which statement best describes the chart's depiction of revenues?

options.A: The last three years have the same revenue.
options.B: Revenue in the first year was the highest.
options.C: It is not possible to tell from the chart which of the last three years has the highest revenue.

explanation: The y-axis maximum is set below the data maximum, so the top three bars are clipped and appear equal; the true values cannot be compared from the chart alone.
